goals.description: Continue the meal with cohort_3, ensuring my full attention remains on them to prevent any perceived neglect or awkwardness that could disrupt our harmony.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) and avoidant conflict style make the risk of social friction unacceptable right now. Even though the scholarship deadline is approaching, the immediate need to protect the flow of this interaction outweighs the abstract future consequence of missing it. I will not check the application again until the group dynamic has fully stabilized.

goals.rationale: While my deliberate nature suggests planning ahead, my current low energy and desire to avoid internal friction mean I cannot force myself to start the scholarship essay yet. Defering to 'fun_now' allows me to recharge for future tasks while keeping the current social obligation as the sole priority. This balances my need for leisure (0.1) with my avoidance of task-induced tension.
